TestDesc.Title: Read data by UDS service ReadDataByIdentifier
TestDesc.Purpose:
DUT has to support UDS service ReadDataByIdentifier.
 This test verifies data payload transmitted by DUT only
 when the parameter 'ExpectedData' is defined. In case
 'ExpectedData' is None it verifies correct response only.
 If the parameter 'ExpectedLength' is defined, the length of
 data payload will be checked. In addition to it the test
 verifies negative response depend on 'ExpectedNRC'.
TestDesc.TestInit:
$[DELAY_SEC]: 1 
$[VOLTAGE]: 12 
$[CURRENT]: 5 

- Wait until DUT reaches Nm state 'NormalOperation'
TestDesc.TestRun:
- Ensure DUT is in expected diagnostic session.
 - Send ReadDataByIdentifier request with given 'DID'.
 - Receive response transmitted by DUT.
 - Verify NRC in case negative response is expected.
 - Verify response data in case positive response is
 expected.
TestDesc.TestExpect:
- DUT sends expected response for diagnostic request.
 - If positive response expected, DUT sends requested data
 in response payload. Received data matches with
 'ExpectedData'.
 - If NRC expected DUT respond with 'ExpectedNRC'
